assertionResults.title: reports line number of the function declaration

assertionResults.title: baseline contains violation details

assertionResults.title: exits 1 when baseline file is missing

assertionResults.title: exits 0 when violation count matches baseline

assertionResults.title: exits 0 when violation count DECREASES (progress)

assertionResults.title: exits 1 when violation count INCREASES above baseline

assertionResults.title: exits 0 in strict mode when no violations exist

assertionResults.title: exits 1 in strict mode when any violation exists
